name: Creative Performance
description: Rank ad creatives by performance with statistical-significance flags so marketers can distinguish meaningful signal from sample-size noise. Fatigue warnings and rotation recommendations included.
alsoSurfaces: Which creatives are statistically winning vs. just lucky?
Which creatives are fatiguing and need rotation?
Which creative–audience pairings produce differential lift?
When should we kill an underperforming creative vs. give it more time?
beforeWeRun: Time window — trailing 30 days, or custom?
Significance threshold — p < 0.05, p < 0.10, or custom?
Channels — all platforms with creative-level data, or specific platforms?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Total creatives, top/bottom counts, fatiguing count.

whatYoullGet.name: Creatives table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable — metrics, significance flag, fatigue flag, audience-of-best-fit per creative.

whatYoullGet.name: Top performers
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with thumbnails, key metrics, significance, audience fit.

whatYoullGet.name: Underperformers
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with thumbnails, reason flagged, recommended action.

whatYoullGet.name: Fatigue warnings
whatYoullGet.desc: Time-series chart per fatiguing creative showing declining trend.

whatYoullGet.name: Audience–creative matrix
whatYoullGet.desc: Heatmap of creative × audience interactions with differential winners flagged.

whatYoullGet.name: Rotation recommendations
whatYoullGet.desc: Specific suggestions tied to specific creatives (kill, scale, refresh, test new variant).

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your creative dashboard in ~9 min.
